title: All Metal Handheld Shower Head, Voolan High Pressure Shower Heads with Handheld Sprayer, Chrome Hand Shower with Teflon Tape, Solid Brass Hand Held Wand Shower(Round)
features: HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Unlike cheap plastic handheld shower heads that easily break and leak, Voolan Showers are ALL METAL and BUILT TO LAST. Using the higher quality 304 stainless steel, cutting-edge finishing processes and laser welding, we over-deliver on QUALITY and DURABILITY.

HIGH PRESSURE: Instead of fiddling with useless hand shower settings, enjoy our single-setting handheld shower head that strikes the perfect balance of GENEROUS COVERAGE and HIGH PRESSURE. Pressurized nozzles and industry maximum 2.5 GPM water flow rate.

EASY TO CLEAN NOZZLES: Our shower head contains dozens of high-heat silicone nozzles that you can wipe clean in seconds. Forget the elbow grease; with minimal effort you will never have any cockeyed spray nozzles or residue build-up again.

EASY INSTALLATION: Installation takes minutes even no instructions, no experience or extra parts needed. Simply screw onto your existing wall mount shower arm attachments (Shower Hose NO INCLUDED). Universal 1/2" connectors compatible with all homes in the UK. (Self-Adhesive Shower Holder, Please Search: B0F5W9MJ5P)

Voolan is stirring up the shower head industry with high quality shower heads - backed by a Limited LIFETIME WARRANTY. If you aren't happy with your purchase, please don't hesitate to contact us directly, we will do everything possible to resolve the situation to your satisfaction. Enjoy a showerhead you can be proud of!
